title: Strike a Pose
description: Allows armor stands to have poses similar to Bedrock
body: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/nxegLh_AZO4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>This datapack expands the customization of armor stands by allowing them to take on unique and dynamic poses, just like in Bedrock Edition. Create statues, scenes, or decorations with more personality, turning a simple armor stand into a powerful tool for creativity and expression in your Minecraft world
